feat(night): predict next intermediate wake from inter-feed gaps

Uses median inter-feed interval from historical night recaps to estimate
the next intermediate wake during an active night session. Models baby
falling asleep immediately after each feed — inter-feed gap ≈ sleep stretch.
Shown in amber in NightModule; hidden if past or after projected morning wake.

Clean up technical debt: re-enable tests, fix test infrastructure, replace placeholder avatars

- Re-enable App.test.tsx that was disabled due to testing library setup
  issues: add @testing-library/dom dependency, configure Jest
  transformIgnorePatterns for ESM modules (axios, react-query), and fix
  test assertion to match actual redirect behavior

  DiceBear initials avatars seeded by user email in both frontend
  api.ts and integration-layer simple-api.ts
- Fix integration test to use IdentityService instead of removed
  CordaService, update proof field names from cordaTransactionHash to
  storageTransactionHash, and mock SolanaService/ApiGateway to avoid
  requiring real blockchain connections during tests
- Fix jest.config.js typo: moduleNameMapping -> moduleNameMapper
- Update tests/setup.ts environment variables from Corda to storage
  backend configuration
- Guard module-level auto-start in index.ts with NODE_ENV check to
  prevent side effects during test imports

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Nullable verdicts, retry, and hard fail for judge errors (#7)

* Distinguish judge errors from failures: nullable verdicts, retry, hard fail

Infrastructure errors (API timeout, crash, bad JSON) now set passed=null
instead of passed=false, preventing corruption of reward signals. Adds
configurable retry (judge_retries, default 1) for transient errors, and
hard-fails with exit code 1 when errors persist — skipping reward.json
but always writing info.json for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix reward.json to only contain score key for Harbor compatibility

Harbor's metric computation expects reward.json to have exactly one key.
The errored_criteria_count and evaluated_criteria_pct fields are already
available in info.json via EvaluationInfo.

Add soffi-client.js script tag to all HTML pages

The soffi-client.js script is required for the Soffi postMessage bridge
to enable element selection and style editing. Without it, static HTML
sites don't work with Soffi's Select/Style Editor. Previously this had
to be manually injected into running containers on each deploy.

Upgrade live alert system: parallel proxies, connection indicator, backoff

commit.message:
fix: bypass storage resolver for article attachment downloads (#2071)

The storage resolver's file_locations table only tracks ModelFile records,
not File table records (article attachments, bounty files). When a File.id
collided with a ModelFile.id, the resolver would return the wrong file
content (e.g. a .safetensors model) while applying the correct attachment
filename in the content-disposition header.

Use the delivery worker directly for attachment downloads since it resolves
via the file's actual S3 URL rather than by ID.

commit.message:
Add `tailbus stop` command for graceful daemon shutdown

Adds a Shutdown RPC to the AgentAPI proto service. The daemon derives an
inner context in Run() so the RPC can trigger cancellation, letting all
goroutines wind down cleanly. Bump version to v0.3.6.

fix: Prevent stale CMake cache values when switching build configs (#224)

## Summary
- Each build config in `build.sh` now explicitly sets all toggle options
to `ON` or `OFF`, preventing stale CMake cache values from persisting
when switching configs (e.g. `gpu-debug-tidy` → `gpu-debug` no longer
leaves clang-tidy enabled)
- When `--iree-source-dir` is not passed, the stale `IREE_SOURCE_DIR`
cache entry left by IREE's `project()` command is cleared so the build
correctly falls back to FetchContent

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Behavioral + metacognition probes: grammar effect, not self-awareness

Llama 3.1 8B behavioral probe (15 trials):
- Self(+2.73) vs Other(+1.60) vs Control(+2.47)
- Control nearly equals Self → grammar effect (1st vs 3rd person)
- NOT genuine self/other distinction

Self-prediction probe (10 trials):
- Self-prediction Jaccard: 0.157, Other-prediction: 0.151
- No significant metacognitive advantage (delta = +0.007)

Key insight: Qwen 3B's dramatic behavioral distinction (Self +5,
Other -2) is RLHF overtrained; Llama 8B shows it's mostly grammar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Update README for hardened preflight script

Document the rewritten preflight: 3-tier GPU cascade (CUDA driver →
NVML → nvidia-smi), smart LOCKDIR resolution with root safety,
starttime-based stale lock detection, ss/lsof PID discovery fallback,
and PID reuse guards on kill. Adds LLAMACPP_PREFLIGHT_LOCKDIR env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: infinite scroll loop when 0 matches found (flickering UI)

When 0 matches are found but canScanMore=true, the sentinel div was
immediately visible causing IntersectionObserver to fire repeatedly in
a tight loop. Fix:
- Separate 0-results path: uses a 300ms debounced auto-continue instead
  of the sentinel/observer
- IntersectionObserver only activates when groups.length > 0 (results
  push sentinel below the fold, preventing instant re-trigger)
- Sentinel div also gated on groups.length > 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: eliminate parallel fetchProfile chains on Google OAuth

Root cause: detectSessionInUrl:true caused Supabase's _initialize to
auto-exchange the OAuth code AND AuthCallback.jsx called exchangeCodeForSession
explicitly → two SIGNED_IN events → two parallel fetchProfile chains, each
exhausting 3 retries (6 total failures) on Render free tier cold start.

Three coordinated fixes:
1. supabase.js: detectSessionInUrl:false + flowType:pkce
   AuthCallback handles the code exchange exclusively; _initialize no longer
   auto-processes the ?code= parameter, eliminating the duplicate exchange.

2. AuthContext.jsx: add isFetchingRef deduplication guard
   If a fetchProfile chain is already running, subsequent auth events
   (INITIAL_SESSION from old localStorage session + new SIGNED_IN) are
   ignored instead of spawning a parallel chain.

3. AuthContext.jsx: increase retry delays [2s,5s,10s,20s,35s] (was 1.5/3/4.5s)
   Covers Render free tier cold start times of up to ~50 seconds.

4. AuthCallback.jsx: increase safety timeout 15s → 60s
   Aligned with the new retry window (total ~72s for 5 retries).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add: Fonctionnalité "Mot de passe oublié" (forgot/reset password)

- Config SMTP (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD, FRONTEND_URL)
- POST /auth/forgot-password: génère token, envoie email de reset
- POST /auth/reset-password: vérifie token, met à jour le mot de passe

- Sécurité: même message si email existe ou non

Frontend:
- Page /forgot-password: formulaire email, message de succès
- Page /reset-password: formulaire nouveau mot de passe avec validation Zod

commit.message:
docs: San-Sō context strata guide + lean CLAUDE.md (#270)

* docs: add San-Sō context strata guide and lean CLAUDE.md

Introduces San-Sō (三層) — a context management framework that organizes
agent context by durability into three strata: self (always-injected
rules), knowledge (on-demand topic files), and ops (thin working state).
Applies the framework to reduce always-injected context by ~60%.

Changes:
- Add docs/san-so.md: San-Sō context strata guide with three-tier model,
  reference map pattern, audit checklist, and relationship to San-Ma
- Lean CLAUDE.md: remove service layer, CLI modules list, domain model
  descriptions, and old lexicon — keep commands, architecture rules, tests
- Wire san-so into docs-site/vision/ symlink and docs.json nav
- Add three-space to docs.json Vision group (was missing from nav)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: merge San-Sō into three-space-architecture as unified principle

San-Sō (context injection strata) was a standalone doc that expressed the
same three-space durability principle as San-Ma (data storage). Merged
into three-space-architecture.md as a new section so both applications of
the principle live in one canonical document.

- Add "Companion Principle: Agent Context Injection (San-Sō 三層)" section
  covering the three context strata, reference map pattern, sizing targets,
  audit checklist, and San-Ma ↔ San-Sō mapping table
- Delete docs/san-so.md (content absorbed)
- Remove docs-site/vision/san-so.md symlink
- Move three-space to top of Vision nav (now the canonical reference)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------
